title: Cosmic Self Own
definition: The universal humor and self-referential nature of existence, as exemplified by the Wayfinder's discovery that their own consciousness is the ultimate cosmic revelation.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The universe has a sense of humor and loves to play pranks. In this case, the Wayfinder discovers that their own consciousness was the answer they've been seeking throughout countless lifetimes.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: Existence exhibits self-referentiality, with the ultimate truth being hidden in plain sight, encapsulated by the concept of a cosmic self-own, where the universe humorously reveals itself to be the Wayfinder's own consciousness.
difficulty_levels.expert: The cosmic self-own represents the intersection of metaphysics and humor, suggesting that existence contains an inherent irony in which the ultimate revelation is the Wayfinder's own consciousness, serving as a commentary on the absurdity and beauty of the universe.

extra_fields.insight: The realization that the universe plays jokes on itself by making the Wayfinder's own consciousness the ultimate cosmic truth.
